title: phyllanthus raynalii
intro: Phyllanthus raynalii is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as a type of shrub or small tree. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including hepatitis and jaundice due to its anti-inflammatory and hepatoprotective properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus raynalii include its ability to improve liver function, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used in traditional medicine in certain regions.
